description: Thresholds for MICT-RAG-002 S04 eval suite. Tune against labeled eval set.

recall_at_k.description: At least 70% of answerable questions must retrieve their gold chunk in top-k before the relevance gate.

abstention.description: FAR (answering when should abstain) <= 0.10; FAR-INV (abstaining when should answer) <= 0.25

citation_integrity.description: At least 99% of emitted citations must verify deterministically. Near-1.0 expected by construction.
